assertions: evidence_executed: claims demonstrated by runs/enumeration, not asserted
rung_honest: provability rung per claim matches the evidence (no inflation)
provenance: known art named; search/labeling per invent.md
claim_chart: element|evidence|rung table where a claim is made
information_bound: log2(n!) ≈ n log n arithmetic shown (Stirling)
class_level: rules out ALL comparison sorts, not the vendor's box
